'''Kip''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Chorlian sector/Legends|Chorlian sector]] and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Kip (species)|Kip]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. It was a source of [[ulikuo gemstone]]s. It was a damp mud-ball riddled with caves. [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure]] was imprisoned on Kip in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], shortly before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], [[Ysanne Isard]] arranged for [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] to take over Kip and free Zorba. Kip years were roughly equal to three [[Galactic Standard Calendar|standard years]].

{{Planet-stub}}
